calendar.matters:
Motion To Strike Or Alternatively Tax Costs; Memo Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Mar-03-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT VIRGINIA JONES' Motion To Strike Or Alternatively Tax Costs is Off calendar. Please re-set the motion before Judge Wong in Department 504, who issued the judgment.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-27-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Eli Love, Esq. and Devin Fathi, Esq. on behalf of Virgina Jones, Appellant/Defendant.
Paul Nazarian, President of McDecor, Inc. Respondent/Plaintiff.

This case comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Paul Nazarian, testifies on behalf of Respondent/Plaintiff McDecor, Inc. Mr. McDecor presents a binder of previously submitted exhibits to the Court. Opposing counsel reviews the documents before they are given to the Court.

Eli Love, Devin Fathi and Virginia Jones, Appellant/Defendant testify on her behalf.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court issues his ruling in open court. The Court affirms the judgment in favor of the Respondent/Plaintiff with additional costs.

The Court will issue an order and parties will receive judgment in the mail.

All exhibits returned to respective parties.

Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: R. Gumpal, Not reported, (504).
